questions.question_text: What are the four fields of Anthropology and how are they related to each other?
Define descent group. Briefly describe the different forms of descent groups.
Compare and contrast assimilation, integration and marginalization with examples.
What is social stratification? What are the different factors responsible for stratification in a society? Discuss with reference to Pakistan.
Who proposed the idea of “thick description”? Discuss anthropological research as thick description. Also provide examples.
What methods of Anthropological research make it distinct from research in other social sciences?
Discuss religion and supernatural beliefs according to evolutionary perspective.
